title: S Sridhar's Machine Learning Book Conceptual Flow
description: A flowchart illustrating the progressive learning path and conceptual dependencies within S Sridhar's machine learning textbook, mapping foundational concepts to advanced applications.
elements: Core ML Concepts (Supervised/Unsupervised Learning, Model Evaluation)
Algorithm Deep Dives (Regression, Classification, Clustering, Dimensionality Reduction)
Advanced Topics (Neural Networks, Deep Learning, Reinforcement Learning)
relationships: Foundations enable understanding of Core Concepts
Core Concepts are implemented through specific Algorithms
Algorithms form the basis for Advanced Topics
All previous elements combine for practical Applications
